enrichment.short_description: Setmore is an online appointment scheduling platform with branded booking pages, calendar sync, payments, and automated reminders.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Setmore is free appointment scheduling software with booking pages, calendar sync, payments, and reminders for service businesses.

features.title: Branded booking page
features.description: Custom online booking page showing real-time availability for clients to self-schedule.

features.title: Calendar sync
features.description: Two-way synchronization with Google Calendar and Office 365 to avoid double-booking.

features.title: Automated reminders
features.description: Email confirmations and reminders, with SMS reminders available on the Pro plan.

features.title: Payment acceptance
features.description: Accept online and in-person payments through Stripe, Square, or PayPal.

features.title: Video appointments
features.description: Built-in video meeting integration with Zoom and Google Meet.

features.title: Mobile and desktop apps
features.description: Native apps for iOS, Android, Windows, and macOS in addition to the web dashboard.

pros: Free plan supports up to 4 users and 200 appointments a month
Accepts payments through Stripe, Square, or PayPal at checkout
Native mobile and desktop apps in addition to the web dashboard
Pro plan removes appointment limits for a flat per-user price
cons: SMS reminders, two-way calendar sync, and API access require the paid Pro plan
Free plan is capped at 4 users and 200 monthly appointments
Booking page carries Setmore branding unless upgraded to Pro

faqs.question: Is Setmore free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Setmore has a free plan for up to 4 users and 200 appointments per month with a branded booking page and email reminders.

faqs.question: Does Setmore sync with Google Calendar?
faqs.answer: Yes, Setmore syncs with Google Calendar and Office 365, with two-way sync available on the Pro plan.

faqs.question: Can clients pay when they book with Setmore?
faqs.answer: Yes, Setmore integrates with Stripe, Square, and PayPal for accepting online and in-person payments.

faqs.question: Does Setmore have mobile apps?
faqs.answer: Yes, Setmore offers native apps for iOS and Android, plus desktop apps for Windows and macOS.

use_cases.title: Client self-scheduling
use_cases.description: Give clients a branded booking page to pick an available time without back-and-forth emails.

use_cases.title: Paid appointment bookings
use_cases.description: Collect payment at the time of booking through Stripe, Square, or PayPal.

use_cases.title: Multi-staff scheduling
use_cases.description: Coordinate bookings across multiple staff members with unlimited users on the Pro plan.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Setmore?
paragraphs: Setmore is an appointment scheduling platform that gives businesses a branded online booking page, two-way calendar sync, automated reminders, and built-in payment collection.
It offers native apps for iOS, Android, Windows, and macOS alongside its web dashboard, and integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, Stripe, Square, and PayPal.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Setmore is for
paragraphs: Setmore suits small service businesses and solo practitioners that need a free way to take online bookings, with a paid Pro plan for teams that need unlimited users, SMS reminders, and API access.

enrichment.short_description: Appointlet is online meeting scheduling software with shareable booking links, calendar sync, and automated reminders.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Appointlet lets professionals share booking links, sync Google or Outlook calendars, and automate meeting reminders online.

features.title: Scheduling pages
features.description: Customizable, brandable booking pages for clients to pick a meeting time.

features.title: Calendar sync
features.description: Two-way sync with Google Calendar and Office 365 to keep availability accurate.

features.title: Automated reminders
features.description: Automatic invitations and reminders sent to reduce no-shows.

features.title: Team scheduling
features.description: Distribute bookings across multiple staff members from shared scheduling pages.

features.title: Web conferencing
features.description: Automatically generates a video conferencing room for booked meetings.

features.title: Payment collection
features.description: Collect payment at time of booking on the Premium plan.

pros: Free plan requires no credit card and includes unlimited meetings
30-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
Annual billing gives roughly 25% savings over monthly billing
Discount available for accredited educational institutions and nonprofits
cons: Free plan is capped at 5 members, 25 monthly meetings, and 1 scheduling page
Payment collection and Zapier integration require the paid Premium plan
No languages or localization details published on the site

faqs.question: Is Appointlet free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Appointlet has a free plan for up to 5 members with up to 25 meetings per month, no credit card required.

faqs.question: Does Appointlet integrate with Zapier?
faqs.answer: Yes, Zapier integration and webhooks are available on the Premium plan.

faqs.question: Can I collect payments through Appointlet?
faqs.answer: Yes, payment collection at booking time is available on the Premium plan.

faqs.question: Does Appointlet offer a discount for nonprofits?
faqs.answer: Yes, the site states a 25% discount for accredited educational institutions and nonprofits.

use_cases.title: Sharing a booking link
use_cases.description: Let prospects or clients book time directly from a personal scheduling page.

use_cases.title: Team meeting distribution
use_cases.description: Route bookings across multiple staff members from shared scheduling pages.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Appointlet?
paragraphs: Appointlet is online scheduling software that lets professionals share a booking link or embed a widget so clients can pick a meeting time that syncs with Google Calendar or Outlook.
It automatically generates a web conferencing room for each booking and can send automated confirmations and reminders.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Appointlet is for
paragraphs: Appointlet fits individuals and small teams that need a free way to book meetings without a credit card, with a Premium tier for teams that need payment collection and Zapier automation.

enrichment.short_description: Calday is online booking software for solo service providers and small businesses, with a booking page, calendar sync, and payments.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Calday gives solo service providers a booking page, calendar sync, and Stripe payments, with a free-forever plan and a $12/month upgrade.

features.title: Online booking page
features.description: A booking page listing services, availability, and pricing that can go live in minutes.

features.title: Calendar sync
features.description: Appointments sync automatically with Google, Outlook, and Apple Calendar.

features.title: Automated reminders
features.description: Automatic email reminders sent 24 hours and 1 hour before each appointment.

features.title: Client management
features.description: Booking history, notes, and contact details saved per client automatically.

features.title: Integrated payments
features.description: Collect deposits or full payment at booking via Stripe, with only standard Stripe fees applying.

pros: Free-forever plan with no credit card required
Month-to-month billing with no contracts or cancellation fees
Calday does not add its own cut on top of Stripe processing fees
Syncs with Google, Outlook, and Apple Calendar
cons: Only one paid tier is publicly listed, with less plan differentiation than some competitors
No mobile app availability confirmed on the site
Aimed mainly at solo operators and small businesses rather than large teams

faqs.question: Is Calday free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Calday offers a free-forever plan with core booking tools and no credit card required.

faqs.question: Does Calday take a cut of payments?
faqs.answer: No, Calday connects to Stripe for payments and does not add its own fee on top of standard Stripe processing fees.

faqs.question: Does Calday sync with my calendar?
faqs.answer: Yes, every appointment syncs automatically with Google, Outlook, and Apple Calendar.

faqs.question: Is there a contract with Calday?
faqs.answer: No, Calday is billed month-to-month with no contracts, and you can downgrade or cancel anytime.

use_cases.title: Solo service booking
use_cases.description: Set up a booking page for appointments, on-site visits, classes, or consultations in minutes.
use_cases.audience: Solo operators and small service businesses

use_cases.title: Deposit collection
use_cases.description: Collect a deposit or full payment via Stripe at the moment a client books.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Calday?
paragraphs: Calday is booking software built for people who sell their time in person, such as 1-on-1 appointments, on-site visits, classes, consultations, and rentals.
It provides a booking page with services and pricing, automatic calendar sync across Google, Outlook, and Apple, and Stripe-based payment collection.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Calday is for
paragraphs: Calday is aimed at solo operators and small service businesses that want a simple, contract-free booking page rather than a full enterprise scheduling suite.

enrichment.short_description: Doodle is a scheduling platform for finding meeting times through group polls, 1:1 booking pages, and calendar sync.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Doodle helps groups agree on a meeting time with scheduling polls, branded booking pages, and calendar sync starting free.

features.title: Group polls
features.description: Create a poll of proposed times and let invitees vote on what works for them.

features.title: 1:1 booking pages
features.description: Branded booking pages for external contacts to schedule meetings directly.

features.title: Calendar sync
features.description: Connects to existing calendars to check availability and avoid double-booking.

features.title: Payment collection
features.description: Collect payment for booked meetings through a Stripe integration.

features.title: Time protection rules
features.description: Set no-meeting blocks and focus-time limits to protect parts of the calendar.

features.title: Cross-timezone support
features.description: Shows meeting times in each participant's own timezone.

pros: Free tier lets anyone create a scheduling poll without logging in
Rated 4.8/5 on both G2 and Capterra
Calendar-aware time protection rules for focus time
Built-in Stripe payment collection for paid bookings
cons: Detailed paid-plan pricing is not published on the main site and requires visiting a separate premium page
Full integrations list is not detailed on the homepage
Language and platform support are not documented on the site

faqs.question: Is Doodle free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Doodle offers a free tier for creating scheduling polls without logging in, alongside paid premium plans.

faqs.question: Can Doodle collect payments for meetings?
faqs.answer: Yes, Doodle integrates with Stripe to collect payment for booked meetings.

faqs.question: Does Doodle sync with my calendar?
faqs.answer: Yes, Doodle connects to calendars to check availability when scheduling.

faqs.question: Where is Doodle based?
faqs.answer: Doodle describes itself as built in Switzerland.

use_cases.title: Group meeting polls
use_cases.description: Send a poll of proposed times to a group and let them vote on what works.

use_cases.title: External booking pages
use_cases.description: Share a branded booking page so clients or prospects can book time directly.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Doodle?
paragraphs: Doodle is a meeting scheduling platform that helps groups agree on a time through polls, offers branded 1:1 booking pages, and syncs with calendars to protect focus time.
It also supports payment collection for paid bookings through a Stripe integration.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Doodle is for
paragraphs: Doodle suits teams and individuals coordinating group meetings across multiple calendars, from a free polling tool up to paid plans for businesses needing more scheduling pages.

enrichment.short_description: LettuceMeet is a free group scheduling tool where participants overlay their availability on a shared grid to find the best meeting time.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: LettuceMeet is a free, no-signup group scheduling tool that finds the best meeting time from everyone's shared availability.

features.title: No account required
features.description: Create or join a scheduling grid without signing up for an account.

features.title: Visual availability grid
features.description: Participants fill in their availability on a shared grid that highlights overlapping free times.

features.title: Google Calendar overlay
features.description: Connect Google Calendar to view existing events underneath the availability grid.

features.title: Flexible meeting windows
features.description: Schedule across a single day or a range of dates, for group or one-on-one meetings.

features.title: Shareable link
features.description: Share one link with the group so everyone can add their availability.

pros: Completely free with no account or signup required
Simple visual grid makes comparing group availability fast
Google and Outlook calendar overlay avoids re-entering existing events
Works for both group meetings and one-on-one scheduling
cons: No paid tier or advanced team features beyond basic availability polling
No mobile app found on the site
No enterprise, branding, or payment features for businesses

faqs.question: Is LettuceMeet free?
faqs.answer: Yes, LettuceMeet is a free group scheduling tool that doesn't require an account.

faqs.question: Do participants need to sign up?
faqs.answer: No, participants can fill in their availability using just the shared meeting link.

faqs.question: Does LettuceMeet connect to my calendar?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can connect Google Calendar to see your existing events underneath the availability grid.

faqs.question: Can LettuceMeet be used for one-on-one scheduling?
faqs.answer: Yes, when creating a meeting you can choose between a group meeting or a one-on-one meeting.

use_cases.title: Group study or club scheduling
use_cases.description: Share a link so everyone in a group can mark their availability and find an overlapping time.

use_cases.title: Ad hoc team meetings
use_cases.description: Coordinate a one-off meeting across a team without a paid scheduling tool.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is LettuceMeet?
paragraphs: LettuceMeet is a free group scheduling tool that replaces back-and-forth emails with a shared visual grid: each participant marks their availability, and overlapping free times are highlighted automatically.
It requires no account to create or join a meeting, and can overlay a connected Google Calendar to show existing events alongside the availability grid.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who LettuceMeet is for
paragraphs: LettuceMeet suits groups, clubs, and teams that need a quick, free way to agree on a meeting time without creating accounts or paying for a scheduling tool.

enrichment.short_description: Zeeg is scheduling software with an AI voice agent that answers calls, qualifies leads, and books appointments alongside standard booking pages.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Zeeg pairs an AI voice agent that answers and qualifies calls with online booking pages, calendar sync, and CRM workflows.

features.title: AI phone answering
features.description: An AI voice agent answers inbound calls, qualifies leads through conversation, and books the right meeting.

features.title: Online booking pages
features.description: 24/7 scheduling links for one-on-one and group meetings, with white-label branding on higher plans.

features.title: Round-robin distribution
features.description: Routes leads and bookings to the right team member automatically.

features.title: CRM workflows
features.description: Built-in workflow automation and contact management tied to bookings.

features.title: Calendar integrations
features.description: Connects with Google Calendar, Outlook, Office 365, Exchange, and iCloud.

features.title: Video conferencing links
features.description: Automatically attaches Zoom, Google Meet, Teams, or Webex links to booked meetings.

pros: Free Starter plan available permanently, with a 14-day free trial of paid tiers
AI phone-answering feature is uncommon among scheduling tools
GDPR-compliant with data hosted in Europe
Rated 4.9/5 across OMR, Capterra, GetApp, and G2 per the site
cons: Group event hosting and workflow automation require the paid Professional plan or higher
SSO and SCIM provisioning are limited to the top Scale plan
Free Starter plan is limited to 2 scheduling pages and 1 calendar connection

faqs.question: Does Zeeg have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Zeeg's Starter plan is free forever, with 2 active scheduling pages and 1 calendar connection.

faqs.question: What does Zeeg's AI voice agent do?
faqs.answer: It answers inbound calls, has a conversation to qualify the caller, and books the appropriate meeting automatically.

faqs.question: Is Zeeg GDPR compliant?
faqs.answer: Yes, Zeeg is described as GDPR-compliant with data hosted in Europe.

faqs.question: Which calendars does Zeeg support?
faqs.answer: Zeeg integrates with Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, Office 365, Exchange, and iCloud.

use_cases.title: Inbound lead qualification
use_cases.description: Let the AI voice agent answer calls, qualify callers, and book them with the right rep.

use_cases.title: Solo booking page
use_cases.description: Share a single scheduling link for one-on-one meetings on the free Starter plan.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Zeeg?
paragraphs: Zeeg combines a traditional online scheduling tool with an AI voice agent that can answer inbound calls, hold a qualifying conversation, and book the appropriate meeting without a human involved.
It also offers standard scheduling features such as booking pages, round-robin distribution, workflow automation, and calendar integrations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Zeeg is for
paragraphs: Zeeg is aimed at sales and support teams that want inbound calls automatically qualified and booked, as well as solo professionals who just need a booking link on its free plan.

enrichment.short_description: Cronofy is calendar and scheduling infrastructure that lets companies embed calendar sync, meeting scheduling, and transcription into their own apps.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Cronofy is an API platform for embedding calendar sync, scheduling, and meeting transcription into other software products.

features.title: Calendar sync API
features.description: Syncs with Google, Microsoft, Apple, and Exchange calendars from a single integration.

features.title: Scheduling API
features.description: Handles one-on-one, panel, and multi-user scheduling with automatic conferencing link provisioning.

features.title: Meeting transcription
features.description: Captures recordings and transcripts with AI-generated summaries.

features.title: Free sandbox
features.description: Connect up to 20 accounts for free with 24 hours of meeting recording included, no credit card required.

features.title: Pre-built UI components
features.description: Ready-made scheduling UI components in addition to raw API access.

features.title: MCP server
features.description: An MCP server is offered for connecting calendar data to agentic AI workflows.

pros: Free sandbox with no credit card required for testing
Supports Google, Microsoft, Apple, and Exchange calendars from one API
ISO 27001/27701/27018 certified and SOC 2 Type 2 attested
Data centers across the US, UK, Canada, Germany, Australia, and Singapore
cons: Self-serve pricing is not published; plans require visiting a pricing page with a usage-based seat calculator
Built for developers embedding scheduling into other software, not as an end-user booking app on its own
No mobile app or consumer-facing product described on the site

faqs.question: Is Cronofy free to try?
faqs.answer: Yes, Cronofy offers a free sandbox that connects up to 20 accounts with 24 hours of meeting recording, no credit card required.

faqs.question: What calendars does Cronofy support?
faqs.answer: Cronofy syncs with Google, Microsoft, Apple, and Exchange calendars.

faqs.question: Does Cronofy provide meeting transcripts?
faqs.answer: Yes, Cronofy can capture recordings and transcripts with AI-generated summaries.

faqs.question: Is Cronofy compliant with data regulations?
faqs.answer: Yes, Cronofy states ISO 27001/27701/27018 certification, SOC 2 Type 2 attestation, and GDPR, CCPA, and HIPAA compliance.

use_cases.title: Embedded scheduling
use_cases.description: Add calendar sync and scheduling to a SaaS product via API rather than building it in-house.

use_cases.title: High-volume interview scheduling
use_cases.description: Coordinate large numbers of scheduled meetings, as cited in Cronofy's recruiting case studies.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Cronofy?
paragraphs: Cronofy is calendar and scheduling infrastructure that other software products embed via API to add calendar sync, meeting scheduling, and transcription without building it themselves.
It supports Google, Microsoft, Apple, and Exchange calendars, and offers a free sandbox for testing before moving to a paid usage-based plan.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Cronofy is for
paragraphs: Cronofy is built for software companies and platforms, such as recruiting or CRM tools, that need to embed calendar and scheduling capability into their own product rather than end users looking for a standalone booking page.

enrichment.short_description: Penpot is an open-source design platform for UI design, prototyping, and design systems, usable in the cloud or self-hosted.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Penpot is a free, open-source design tool for UI design, prototyping, and design systems, with cloud and self-hosted options.

features.title: UI design
features.description: Build responsive interfaces and interactive prototypes with CSS Grid and Flexbox layout support.

features.title: Design systems
features.description: Create shared component libraries and design tokens across a team.

features.title: Design-to-code workflows
features.description: AI-assisted workflows for going between code and design.

features.title: Open file format
features.description: Built on open standards including CSS, HTML, SVG, and Penpot's own open file format.

features.title: Self-hosting
features.description: Can be self-hosted as an alternative to the cloud-hosted version.

features.title: Multiplayer collaboration
features.description: Real-time collaborative editing across team members.

pros: Fully open-source, unlike most mainstream design tools
Free plan supports up to 8 team members with unlimited viewers
Self-hosting option for teams that need full control over their data
Built on open web standards (SVG, CSS, HTML) rather than a proprietary format
cons: Advanced admin features like SSO and audit logs require the Enterprise tier
Self-hosted Private Server plan is priced at $50,000/year, out of reach for small teams
Free plan is capped at 8 team members

faqs.question: Is Penpot free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Penpot's Professional plan is free for up to 8 team members with unlimited viewers.

faqs.question: Is Penpot open source?
faqs.answer: Yes, Penpot is an open-source design platform built on open standards like SVG, CSS, and HTML.

faqs.question: Can Penpot be self-hosted?
faqs.answer: Yes, Penpot offers a self-hosted Private Server option in addition to the cloud-hosted plans.

faqs.question: Does Penpot support design systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, Penpot includes design components, design tokens, and shared libraries for design systems.

use_cases.title: Open-source design workflow
use_cases.description: Design UIs and prototypes without relying on a closed, proprietary file format.
use_cases.audience: Design teams wanting an open-source alternative

use_cases.title: Design-to-code handoff
use_cases.description: Use design-to-code and code-to-design workflows to bridge design and development.

features: Capped at $175/month regardless of team size

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Penpot?
paragraphs: Penpot is an open-source design platform for UI design, prototyping, and design systems, built on open web standards like SVG, CSS, and HTML rather than a proprietary file format.
It can be used as a cloud-hosted product or self-hosted on a team's own infrastructure, and includes plugin support and real-time multiplayer collaboration.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Penpot is for
paragraphs: Penpot suits design and product teams that want an open-source alternative to proprietary design tools, especially those that value self-hosting or working with open file formats.

enrichment.short_description: Lunacy is a free graphic design app for Windows, Mac, and Linux with vector editing, offline use, and Sketch/Figma file import.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Lunacy by Icons8 is a free desktop design app for Windows, Mac, and Linux with offline editing and Sketch/Figma import.

features.title: Offline editing
features.description: Works fully offline as a native desktop app, unlike browser-based design tools.

features.title: Sketch and Figma import
features.description: Can open Sketch files and import designs from Figma.

features.title: Built-in design assets
features.description: Includes built-in vectors, photos, icons, illustrations, and UI kits.

features.title: Responsive design constraints
features.description: Define constraints and rules so elements adapt responsively.

features.title: Real-time collaboration
features.description: Collaborate on projects with live feedback, text and audio chat, and sticker reactions.

pros: Free plan includes all major features with no ads or restrictions
Native apps for Windows, Mac, and Linux that work fully offline
Can open Sketch files and import from Figma without conversion tools
Includes built-in stock icons, illustrations, and UI kits
cons: No web-based version confirmed; it is a native desktop app
No iOS or Android app found on the site
Paid plan pricing and its exact feature differences from the free plan are not detailed on the main page

faqs.question: Is Lunacy free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lunacy's free plan includes all major features with no ads, and a paid plan is available for extra benefits starting at $11.99/month.

faqs.question: Can Lunacy open Sketch files?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lunacy can open Sketch files and import designs from Figma.

faqs.question: Does Lunacy work offline?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lunacy works offline as a native desktop application.

faqs.question: What platforms does Lunacy support?
faqs.answer: Lunacy has native apps for Windows, Mac, and Linux.

use_cases.title: Offline design work
use_cases.description: Design without an internet connection using a native desktop app.

use_cases.title: Migrating from Sketch or Figma
use_cases.description: Open existing Sketch files or import Figma designs into a free tool.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Lunacy?
paragraphs: Lunacy is a free graphic design app from Icons8 for Windows, Mac, and Linux that works fully offline and can open Sketch files or import Figma designs.
It includes built-in vectors, photos, icons, illustrations, and UI kits, along with responsive design constraints and real-time collaboration.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Lunacy is for
paragraphs: Lunacy suits designers who want a free, native desktop alternative to browser-based tools, including those migrating existing Sketch or Figma files.

enrichment.short_description: Visme is an online design tool for creating presentations, infographics, documents, and videos using templates and an AI design assistant.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Visme is a design platform for presentations, infographics, and video with templates, a brand kit, and an AI design assistant.

features.title: AI Designer
features.description: Generates designs from text prompts to speed up the creation process.

features.title: Data visualization
features.description: Build interactive charts and data visualizations within a design.

features.title: Template library
features.description: Thousands of customizable templates for presentations, infographics, and social content.

features.title: Brand kit
features.description: Store brand colors, fonts, and logos to keep content consistent across a team.

features.title: Social media scheduler
features.description: Schedule and publish social media graphics directly from Visme.

features.title: Real-time collaboration
features.description: Comment and collaborate on projects with teammates in real time.

pros: Free plan available with unlimited projects, though with limited templates and assets
Large template library covering presentations, infographics, documents, and video
Wide integration list including HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack, and monday.com
5-star ratings and a G2 Leader badge cited on the site
cons: Free Basic plan restricts premium templates, assets, and export formats
Advanced exports like PPTX, HTML5, and video/GIF require the Pro plan or higher
Enterprise plan requires a minimum of 10 users

faqs.question: Is Visme free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Visme has a free Basic plan with unlimited projects, though with limited templates and assets.

faqs.question: Does Visme have an AI design tool?
faqs.answer: Yes, Visme's AI Designer can generate designs from text prompts.

faqs.question: What languages does Visme support?
faqs.answer: Visme supports 15+ languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, and Arabic.

faqs.question: Does Visme offer education pricing?
faqs.answer: Yes, Visme offers separate Student and Educator plans, priced at $48/year and $96/year respectively.

use_cases.title: Branded marketing content
use_cases.description: Create on-brand presentations, infographics, and social graphics using a shared brand kit.

use_cases.title: Academic presentations
use_cases.description: Build presentations and reports using discounted Student or Educator plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Visme?
paragraphs: Visme is a design platform for creating presentations, infographics, documents, reports, videos, and social media graphics using templates, an AI Designer, and a shared brand kit.
It supports 15+ languages and integrates with tools like HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack, monday.com, and Google Drive.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Visme is for
paragraphs: Visme suits marketing teams and educators who need branded, templated visual content, with a free Basic plan for individuals and paid plans for teams needing advanced exports and collaboration.
